If you could meet any fictional character who would you chose and why?

I’d pick Uncle Iroh. He’s wise without being preachy, powerful without needing to prove it, and somehow makes tea, patience, and life advice feel equally important. Feels like the kind of person you could talk to for five minutes and rethink your entire outlook afterward.
Harry Dresden. I would ask him to teach me how to be a wizard!
doctor who, because it is a chance to fly all over universe with him (there is a book about him too)
The childhood whimsy of meeting Sora from Kingdom Hearts would be neat. The key blade is a bonus too

Raistlin Majere for the opportunity to apprentice with the arguably most powerful mage ever, but also the chance to campaign with the Companions and maybe even meet a dragon.

(p.s. I heart Tass)
clifford the big red dog. i want giant dog cuddles
the very hungry caterpillar, because I would do my best to feed it as much as I could
Probably some vampire or wizard that could make me immortal lol
i think i would chose superman just cos i think he would be really nice conversation
Paul atraides and ask him why he chickened out of commuting to the golden path
David tenant doctor who or Matt smith one. Love to meet either of those Doctors. They’re both my favorites
Hester Shaw from the Mortal Engines book series

Someone from the last airbender universe. Not Aang because I think we'd probably frustrate each other with our ideals, but like Toph or Sokka would be cool. I think Sokka because he's a doofus but a great inventor, and I'd love to just vibe with him creating shit
